sentences.target: Tu mets un timbre sur l'enveloppe.

translations.fr: Tu mets un timbre sur l'enveloppe.
translations.en: You’re putting a stamp on the envelope.
translations.es: Estás poniendo un sello en el sobre.
translations.de: Du klebst eine Briefmarke auf den Umschlag.
translations.it: Stai attaccando un francobollo sulla busta.
translations.zh-Hans: 你正在把邮票贴在信封上。
translations.pt: Você está colando um selo no envelope.
translations.vi: Bạn đang dán tem lên phong bì.
translations.ar: أنت تلصق طابع بريد على الظرف.
translations.nl: Je plakt een postzegel op de envelop.
translations.hi: तुम लिफाफे पर टिकट लगा रहे हो.
translations.nb: Du klistrer et frimerke på konvolutten.
translations.id: Kamu sedang menempelkan perangko di amplop.
translations.sv: Du sätter ett frimärke på kuvertet.
translations.da: Du sætter et frimærke på konvolutten.
translations.ja: 封筒に切手を貼っています。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun; grammatical subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; takes a direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determines the noun 'timbre' (direct object).
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'mets'.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article elided before a vowel; here feminine (from 'la'), agreeing with 'enveloppe'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: Je cherche l'enveloppe bleue sur la table.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ l‿ɑ̃.və.lɔp blø syʁ la tabl/

translations.fr: Je cherche l'enveloppe bleue sur la table.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ l‿ɑ̃.və.lɔp blø syʁ la tabl/
translations.en: I’m looking for the blue envelope on the table.
translations.es: Estoy buscando el sobre azul en la mesa.
translations.de: Ich suche den blauen Umschlag auf dem Tisch.
translations.it: Sto cercando la busta blu sul tavolo.
translations.ko: 탁자 위에 있는 파란 봉투를 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在找桌子上的蓝色信封。
translations.yue: 我喺度搵枱上面嗰個藍色信封。
translations.ru: Я ищу синий конверт на столе.
translations.pt: Estou procurando o envelope azul na mesa.
translations.he: אני מחפש את המעטפה הכחולה שעל השולחן.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm phong bì màu xanh trên bàn.
translations.ar: أنا أبحث عن الظرف الأزرق على الطاولة.
translations.nl: Ik zoek de blauwe envelop op tafel.
translations.uk: Я шукаю синій конверт на столі.
translations.hu: A kék borítékot keresem az asztalon.
translations.hi: मैं मेज पर रखे नीले लिफाफे को ढूंढ रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Ψάχνω τον μπλε φάκελο πάνω στο τραπέζι.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter den blå konvolutten på bordet.
translations.id: Saya sedang mencari amplop biru di atas meja.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter det blå kuvertet på bordet.
translations.ro: Caut plicul albastru de pe masă.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter den blå konvolut på bordet.
translations.ja: テーブルの上の青い封筒を探しています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun; grammatical subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive ('look for').
Definite article elided before a vowel; feminine here (from 'la'), with 'enveloppe'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'cherche'.
Adjective, feminine singular; agrees with 'enveloppe' and appears post-nominal.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular; determines 'table'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: On doit écrire l'adresse sur l'enveloppe.

translations.fr: On doit écrire l'adresse sur l'enveloppe.
translations.en: We need to write the address on the envelope.
translations.es: Tenemos que escribir la dirección en el sobre.
translations.de: Wir müssen die Adresse auf den Umschlag schreiben.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们需要在信封上写地址。
translations.yue: 我哋要喺信封上面寫地址。
translations.ru: Нам нужно написать адрес на конверте.
translations.pt: Precisamos escrever o endereço no envelope.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים לכתוב את הכתובת על המעטפה.
translations.vi: Chúng ta cần viết địa chỉ lên phong bì.
translations.ar: علينا أن نكتب العنوان على الظرف.
translations.nl: We moeten het adres op de envelop schreiben.
translations.uk: Нам потрібно написати адресу на конверті.
translations.hu: A címet rá kell írnunk a borítékra.
translations.hi: हमें लिफाफे पर पता लिखना है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να γράψουμε τη διεύθυνση πάνω στον φάκελο.
translations.nb: Vi må skrive adressen på konvolutten.
translations.id: Kita perlu menulis alamat di amplop.
translations.sv: Vi behöver skriva adressen på kuvertet.
translations.ro: Trebuie să scriem adresa pe plic.
translations.da: Vi skal skrive adressen på konvolutten.
translations.ja: 封筒に住所を書かなければなりません。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun often used colloquially for 'we'; grammatical subject.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; selects an infinitive ('écrire').
Infinitive verb; complement of the modal 'doit'.
Definite article elided before a vowel; feminine here (from 'la'), with 'adresse'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'écrire'.
Preposition introducing a locative/prepositional phrase.
Definite article elided before a vowel; feminine here (from 'la'), with 'enveloppe'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: Nous scellons l'enveloppe avant de sortir.

translations.fr: Nous scellons l'enveloppe avant de sortir.
translations.en: We’re sealing the envelope before going out.
translations.es: Sellamos el sobre antes de salir.
translations.de: Wir kleben den Umschlag zu, bevor wir rausgehen.
translations.it: Chiudiamo la busta prima di uscire.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在出门前把信封封好。
translations.yue: 我哋出門前封好個信封。
translations.pt: Selamos o envelope antes de sair.
translations.he: אנחנו אוטמים את המעטפה לפני שאנחנו יוצאים.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi dán kín phong bì trước khi ra ngoài.
translations.nl: We plakken de envelop dicht voordat we weggaan.
translations.hi: बाहर जाने से पहले हम लिफ़ाफ़ा सील कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Σφραγίζουμε τον φάκελο πριν βγούμε έξω.
translations.nb: Vi limer igjen konvolutten før vi går ut.
translations.sv: Vi klistrar igen kuvertet innan vi går ut.
translations.da: Vi forsegler konvolutten, før vi går ud.
translations.fi: Suljemme kirjekuoren ennen kuin lähdemme ulos.
translations.ja: 出かける前に封筒に封をします。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural subject pronoun; grammatical subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive.
Definite article elided before a vowel; feminine here (from 'la'), with 'enveloppe'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'scellons'.
Preposition; forms the complex preposition 'avant de' introducing an infinitival clause.
Preposition functioning as an infinitive linker in the sequence 'avant de' before 'sortir'.
Infinitive verb; complement of the complex preposition 'avant de'.
